mapper.select: SELECT categoryNo, categoryName, categoryDescribe, categoryImagePath FROM category WHERE categoryNo < 6 ORDER BY categoryNo
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET readCount = readCount + 1 WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rank, boardNo, boardName, fk_categoryNo, readCount FROM ( SELECT boardNo, boardName, fk_categoryNo, readCount FROM board WHERE createdAtBoard >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) ORDER BY readCount DESC ) ) WHERE rank <= 5
SELECT boardNo, boardName, boardContent, fk_id, readCount, createdAtBoard, fk_categoryNo FROM board

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rank, boardNo, boardName, fk_categoryNo, readCount, NVL(commentCount, 0) AS commentCount FROM ( SELECT boardNo, boardName, fk_categoryNo, readCount FROM board WHERE createdAtBoard >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) ) b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fk_boardNo, COUNT(*) AS commentCount FROM comments GROUP BY fk_boardNo ) c ON b.boardNo = c.fk_boardNo ORDER BY c.commentCount DESC NULLS LAST ) WHERE rank <= 5
